global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore trending content for free.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: top background area
elements.description: A light green rectangular area at the top of the ad, providing a soft backdrop for the logo and text.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape in the center, featuring a mix of rounded and rectangular forms in a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: Another large, abstract shape overlapping with the previous one, maintaining the light green color theme.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the center, slightly darker than the background, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rounded shape in the center, complementing the other graphic elements with a similar color palette.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A large, rounded shape in the center, contributing to the abstract design with a light green hue.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rounded shape in the center, harmonizing with the overall light green theme.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A large, rounded shape in the center, slightly darker than the background, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: trending text
elements.description: A small text area at the bottom center, featuring bold, dark text that stands out against the lighter background.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A prominent black button at the bottom center with white text, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: A large, bold text area at the bottom, prominently displaying the message in dark font against a light background.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending Try for free

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the text 'NeonCast' in a simple, modern font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left, indicating 'UGC' in a simple font, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, featuring abstract shapes and a strong call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the main graphic elements are centered, and the CTA is prominently displayed.
